blended.narrative: Timberline is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 4" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: 13.2" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 10" over the past week. Current depth: 47".
